name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, overdue invoices cause cash flow gaps. We send weekly reminder reports instead of manual tracking of invoices and reminders.
problem_solved: Overdue customer invoices lead to cash flow gaps.
features: basic dashboard for tracking overdue invoices
